content.full_text:
CITY OF BERKELEY

FRED WEEKES
COUNCILMEMBER
DISTRICT 8
7-2-90

Mr. Jonathon Rothman
FCCP
Sacramento, California

Dear Mr. Rothman,

Because of our conversation concerning the transfer of funds from one campaign to another, I am requesting that you put your findings in writing and send us a copy. We have about $2000 left over from the 1988 Council campaign which we would like to put into this year's Mayoral campaign.

Thank you for your help.

Sincerely,

Fred Weekes
